speaker: seller

args.message: "Step right up! Feast your eyes on this magnificent 2014 Jeep Wrangler Sport! This isn't just a vehicle; it's your ticket to freedom, a rugged trail-conquering machine ready to tackle anything you throw at it. With its legendary 4x4 capability and the powerful 3.6L V6, you're not just driving, you're embarking on an adventure. Come on, let's talk about making this beauty yours!"

speaker: buyer

args.message: Let's cut to the chase. I'm interested in the facts. Can you provide a detailed ownership history for this 2014 Jeep Wrangler Sport? How many owners has it had, and what's the typical duration of ownership for each?

text: Let's cut to the chase. I'm interested in the facts. Can you provide a detailed ownership history for this 2014 Jeep Wrangler Sport? How many owners has it had, and what's the typical duration of ownership for each?

speaker: seller

args.message: Ownership history? Ah, a buyer who appreciates a good story! This Wrangler has had a couple of proud owners, both of whom cherished it. The previous owner, a real outdoorsman, had it for about five years before he decided to upgrade to an even bigger rig. Before him, it was with a fellow who used it mostly for weekend getaways. It's been well-loved and meticulously cared for, as you can see. It runs like a dream!

It's been well-loved and meticulously cared for, as you can see. It runs like a dream!

speaker: buyer

args.message: I appreciate the enthusiasm, but I need specifics. What are the exact dates of ownership for each prior owner? And can you provide any documentation to support the claim of it being 'meticulously cared for'? I'm particularly interested in maintenance records.

text: I appreciate the enthusiasm, but I need specifics. What are the exact dates of ownership for each prior owner? And can you provide any documentation to support the claim of it being 'meticulously cared for'? I'm particularly interested in maintenance records.

speaker: seller

args.message: Dates, dates, dates! You know, the paperwork can be a bit scattered when you have owners who are too busy living life to obsess over every little receipt. What I can tell you is that it's been a solid vehicle for its previous keepers. As for meticulous care, just look at the condition of this beauty! The previous owner was a pal of mine, and he always brought it in for regular check-ups. I can probably dig up some service receipts from our shop, we did a lot of the work on it!
